meaning: n.植物,庄稼,工厂,车间,设备vt.种植,栽培,培养,安置vi.种植
examples: This plant is a vigorous grower.
The plant exudes a sticky fluid.
The plant naturalizes well in grass.
The massive quake knocked out cooling systems to reactors at the country's Fukushima nuclear plant.
There are 400 wine producers in Poland, but most plant only a few acres.
